narrative: US-Iran tensions over the weekend may weigh on USD at the Tokyo open, given Trump's comments on European autos and Iran proposal uncertainty. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 157.03; BoJ meeting on 28 Apr may pressure USD/JPY if hawkish surprise emerges.
